title: MyGene.info (BioThings) connector (REST) — gene annotation as SQL
description: A BioThings/MyGene gene record as DATA: a GET to mygene.info parsed into a table by ducknng_ncurl_table; the id is the binding {gene_id}. The same shape serves any BioThings API (MyVariant, MyChem) — point it at a new URL.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (a ducknng_ncurl_table GET).
